system.effect: The psyker exhales a cone of warpfire, functioning like a flamer weapon. All creatures in a 30-degree arc out to Psy Rating x 3 metres suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame and Spray qualities.

description.value: The psyker opens his mouth and projects a torrent of psychic flame in a cone before him. This functions like a weapon with the Flame and Spray qualities, affecting all targets in a 30-degree arc extending Psy Rating x 3 metres. Targets suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with the Flame quality.
